data.title: The whale that bought 2.2 million Trump tokens today previously suffered a huge loss of $14.61 million on Melania.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin, a whale who lost $14.61 million on MELANIA in February last year has bought 2.2 million TRUMP tokens ($6.97 million) today in preparation for attending a conference: 1. In early February last year, he spent 28.93 million USDC to buy 13.975 million MELANIA tokens, with an average cost of $2.07. 2. At the end of February, he sold all his holdings at a price of $1.02, incurring a loss of $14.61 million (-50%). 3. Today, he bought 2.2 million TRUMP tokens ($6.97 million) at a price of $3.17.

data.title: Tether plans to complete a full audit by 2026, with a valuation target of $500 billion.
data.description: Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino stated that the company plans to complete a full audit by the end of 2026 and is currently in discussions with the Big Four accounting firms. Tether disclosed that its profits exceeded $10 billion last year and currently holds approximately $122 billion in U.S. Treasury bonds, making it the 17th largest holder of U.S. Treasury bonds globally. Furthermore, Tether is promoting its compliant token, USAT, in the U.S. market and has made over 140 investments in areas such as artificial intelligence, energy, and brain-computer interfaces. Tether is also currently attracting investors globally, attempting to establish a company valuation of $500 billion, making it one of the world's most valuable private companies. (Bloomberg)

data.title: The strong rise in Gate TradFi crude oil contracts boosted trading activity in silver and platinum.
data.description: Driven by the strong surge in crude oil contracts, the metals sector showed mixed performance, with silver and platinum prices retreating in tandem. However, trading activity increased significantly, driving up trading volume for Gate TradFi's silver trust and platinum contracts. According to Coinglass data, Gate's SLVONUSDT (Anshuo Silver Trust) is currently trading at $74.5, with a 24-hour spot trading volume of $1.2555 million, a 19.00% increase; SLVONUSDT's 24-hour contract trading volume reached $1.2953 million, a 15.14% increase, ranking first in both trading volume and market share. Additionally, XPTUSDT (platinum) is currently trading at $2,074, with a 24-hour contract trading volume of $3.3807 million, a 45.98% increase, and current open interest of $2.9558 million. Currently, Gate TradFi has officially opened up CFD trading to users for a variety of traditional financial assets, including gold, silver, platinum, palladium, copper, aluminum, lead, nickel, crude oil, and natural gas, supporting leverage up to 500x.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Borrowing to Hit $578 Billion in Q1 2026 Amid Global Holdings Shift
data.description: The U.S. Treasury Department has announced that borrowing is projected to reach $578 billion in the first quarter of 2026. According to NS3.AI, this estimate is based on an anticipated cash balance of $850 billion by the end of March. Additionally, Treasury International Capital (TIC) data revealed that China, India, and Brazil have decreased their holdings of U.S. Treasuries over the 12 months leading up to December 2025. Meanwhile, the U.S. debt-to-GDP ratio remains at approximately 123.48%.

data.title: U.S. Housing Market Faces Challenges in Starter Home Availability
data.description: The American starter home, once a staple for first-time buyers, appears to be disappearing from the market. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting insights from Scott Lincicome, who suggests that the reasons behind this trend are more complex than simply blaming developers or investors. Factors such as regulatory hurdles, zoning laws, and rising construction costs are contributing to the scarcity of affordable entry-level homes. These challenges are reshaping the housing landscape, making it increasingly difficult for new buyers to enter the market. As the situation evolves, stakeholders are urged to consider policy changes that could alleviate these pressures and revive the availability of starter homes.

data.title: German Chancellor Merz Seeks Clarity on U.S. Government's Motives
data.description: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz has expressed a desire to understand the motivations behind the actions of the U.S. government. According to Jin10, Merz's comments come amid ongoing discussions between Germany and the United States on various geopolitical and economic issues. The Chancellor emphasized the importance of transparency and open communication between the two nations to foster mutual understanding and cooperation. This statement highlights the need for clarity in international relations, particularly in the context of current global challenges.

data.title: German Chancellor Merz: No Need for Military Protection of Sea Routes
data.description: German Chancellor Merz stated that there is no reason to consider military protection for sea routes. According to Jin10, this statement comes amid discussions on international maritime security. Chancellor Merz emphasized the importance of diplomatic solutions and international cooperation in maintaining safe and open sea lanes. The German government remains committed to peaceful resolutions and collaboration with global partners to address any potential threats to maritime security.

data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks were mixed in pre-market trading in the US, with Circle rising 1.24%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, pre-market performance of crypto stocks in the US was mixed. Robinhood fell 3.71% to $76.12 pre-market; Hut 8 fell 5.05% to $48.54 pre-market; Coinbase fell 2.37% to $193.23 pre-market; Circle rose 1.24% to $114.21 pre-market; and MARA rose 2.46% to $8.76 pre-market. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Germany Considers Using Oil Reserves to Control Prices
data.description: Germany's Chancellor Merz has announced plans to utilize the country's oil reserves as a measure to help stabilize oil prices. According to Jin10, this decision comes amid rising concerns over fluctuating energy costs impacting the economy. The move is expected to provide temporary relief in controlling price volatility, although long-term solutions are still being sought. The strategy reflects Germany's proactive approach in addressing energy market challenges and ensuring economic stability.

data.title: U.S. Defense Assets Remain in Philippines Amid Middle East Tensions
data.description: The Philippine military has confirmed that U.S. defense assets remain stationed in the Southeast Asian nation. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting concerns that the United States might be reallocating military resources to the Middle East due to ongoing conflicts involving Iran. Despite these concerns, the Philippine military reassures that American defense capabilities in the region have not been affected by the situation in the Middle East. The presence of U.S. military assets in the Philippines is part of a longstanding defense cooperation between the two countries, aimed at maintaining regional security and stability.

data.title: Analysis: Bitcoin has formed an accumulation zone between $62,000 and $72,000, which may lead to a new breakout.
data.description: Amid ongoing geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, Bitcoin prices broke through $72,000, reaching a new high since March 5th, demonstrating strong market resilience. The market is also focused on the upcoming release of the US PCE price index, a key indicator for the Federal Reserve's inflation measurement. US President Trump again pressured the Fed ahead of the PCE data release, demanding Chairman Powell cut interest rates immediately, stating that it shouldn't wait until the next policy meeting. Bitcoin's performance amid recent geopolitical shocks has been "unexpectedly strong," with Glassnode data showing a new accumulation zone forming in the $62,000 to $72,000 range. However, compared to previous periods that drove significant price increases, the current accumulation strength remains relatively limited. Analysts believe that if funds continue to flow in, Bitcoin could potentially form new medium-term breakout momentum. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Germany to Finalize Industrial Electricity Subsidy Guidelines by Summer
data.description: Germany's Economy Minister, Reich, announced that guidelines for industrial electricity subsidies will be finalized by summer. According to Jin10, this move aims to allow companies to apply for retroactive subsidies. The decision is part of Germany's broader strategy to support its industrial sector amid rising energy costs. The finalized guidelines are expected to provide clarity and financial relief to businesses, ensuring they can plan their operations with more certainty.

data.title: UK Government Plans Overhaul of Nuclear Power Sector
data.description: The UK government has announced plans to revamp its nuclear power sector following a critical review. Bloomberg posted on X that the review highlighted the sector's tendency to prioritize process over outcomes and described it as overly risk-averse. The government aims to address these issues to enhance efficiency and effectiveness in the nuclear power industry.

data.title: Tokyo Electric Power Company Halts Operations at Kashiwazaki-Kariwa Nuclear Reactor
data.description: Tokyo Electric Power Company (TEPCO) has announced a temporary suspension of operations at the No. 6 reactor of the Kashiwazaki-Kariwa Nuclear Power Plant. According to Jin10, this decision comes amid ongoing safety assessments and regulatory reviews. The halt in operations is part of TEPCO's efforts to ensure compliance with safety standards and address any potential concerns. The company has not specified the duration of the suspension or the exact reasons behind the decision. This development is being closely monitored by industry observers and regulatory bodies, as it may impact Japan's energy supply and nuclear policy.

data.title: Analysis: Bitcoin held above $71,000 despite a stronger dollar, oil prices, and US Treasury yields.
data.description: Despite macroeconomic pressures from a stronger dollar, rising oil prices, and climbing US Treasury yields, Bitcoin has remained resilient, holding above $71,000. Data shows that the US Dollar Index (DXY), a measure of dollar strength, has climbed back above 100, the US 10-year Treasury yield has risen above 4.2%, and Brent and WTI crude oil prices are nearing $100 per barrel. Market concerns about inflation and rising interest rates have intensified. However, since the escalation of the Middle East conflict on March 1, Bitcoin has remained one of the best-performing macro assets. In the crypto-related stock market, Strategy (MSTR), a publicly traded company holding cryptocurrencies, rose about 1% pre-market after raising approximately 11,000 BTC this week through the issuance of perpetual preferred securities. Crypto exchange Coinbase (COIN) rose about 2%, while some Bitcoin mining companies transitioning to AI businesses, such as IREN and Cipher Digital, saw slight declines. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Trump broke through 3.8 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 35.56%.
data.description: OKX market data shows that Trump has broken through 3.8 USDT and is currently trading at 3.86 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 35.56%.

data.title: Iranian Official Comments on Tehran Explosion
data.description: Iran's Supreme National Security Council Secretary, Ali Larijani, addressed the recent explosion near a gathering site in Tehran. According to Jin10, Larijani stated that the attack was driven by fear and desperation, suggesting that a strong entity would not resort to bombing during a parade. He emphasized that the perpetrators are on the brink of collapse.

data.title: BitMart will be listed on Unitas Labs ($UP)
data.description: According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch Unitas Labs ($UP) on March 13th at 19:00 (UTC+8), with the $UP/USDT trading pair available. Unitas aims to build a global savings layer for digital assets, providing users with transparent USD-denominated returns through market-neutral/Delta-neutral on-chain strategies.

data.title: U.S. National Debt Reaches $38.88 Trillion Amid Concerns Over War Spending
data.description: The U.S. national debt has increased by approximately $543 billion over the past four months, reaching a total of $38.88 trillion, as reported by the U.S. Treasury Department. According to NS3.AI, this significant rise in debt has sparked concerns among financial analysts and policymakers. Former Congressman Ron Paul has issued a warning that spending related to potential conflicts with Iran could exacerbate debt pressures and lead to a more severe economic downturn. The growing national debt continues to be a critical issue for the U.S. economy, with implications for future fiscal policies and economic stability.
